_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to analyse and evaluate how specific sentence structures express and craft ideas with precision and effect.

_source.w: We are learning to analyse and evaluate how specific sentence structures express and craft ideas with precision and effect.
y: At this level, sentence construction becomes a deliberate craft — every structural choice shapes meaning.
Evaluating sentence-level effectiveness helps us fine-tune our own writing for maximum impact.
This skill distinguishes competent writing from writing that is truly compelling and effective.
eg: We analyse how authors use different sentence structures — simple, compound, complex — strategically within a text.
We evaluate the effectiveness of particular sentence constructions in achieving specific effects.
We examine how sentence structure can create emphasis, rhythm, pace and emotional impact.
We compare the sentence-level strategies of different skilled writers.
We experiment with crafting sentences that use structure deliberately for precision and effect.
We edit our writing at the sentence level, evaluating and improving each sentence's contribution to the whole.
